sprints.title: AgentForge v6.0 — Execution API, Live Streaming & Full Dashboard

items.title: Execution API — POST /api/v5/run
items.description: Implement POST /api/v5/run endpoint that triggers real AgentRuntime calls with live streaming. Reads agent YAML from .agentforge/agents/, maps model tier from agent config, calls Anthropic API with streaming enabled, and publishes output chunks as SSE events in real time. GET /api/v5/run/:sessionId for session retrieval and replay.

items.title: AgentRuntime Streaming — runStreaming() method
items.description: Add runStreaming() method to AgentRuntime class using Anthropic SDK streaming API. Exposes onChunk and onEvent callbacks for real-time output delivery. Seamlessly integrated with the SSE message bus so dashboard clients receive live token output without polling.

items.title: Agent Runner Dashboard Page — /runner route
items.description: New /runner route in the SvelteKit dashboard providing an enterprise UI to trigger live agent runs from the browser. Includes agent selector (reads from API), task text input, real-time SSE output panel with streaming token display, run history list, and per-run cost estimates.

items.title: Approvals Queue UI — /approvals route
items.description: Full human-in-the-loop approval workflow UI at /approvals route. Displays pending approvals queue, supports approve and deny actions with one click, auto-refreshes queue state, and shows queue stats (pending count, approved count, denied count).

items.title: Knowledge Graph UI — /knowledge route
items.description: New /knowledge route enabling search, browse, and add operations against the knowledge store. Connects to the existing knowledge API endpoints. Supports keyword search, entry listing with metadata, and manual entry creation.

items.title: Sprint API — /api/v5/sprints endpoints
items.description: Implement GET /api/v5/sprints (list all sprints) and GET /api/v5/sprints/:version (retrieve single sprint) endpoints. Reads .agentforge/sprints/*.json files from disk and normalizes them to a consistent schema before returning. Supports version-based lookup with proper 404 handling.

items.title: Dashboard Navigation Expansion
items.description: Add new sidebar navigation entries for the three new dashboard pages: Agent Runner and Approvals under the Operations section; Knowledge under the Intelligence section. Updates SvelteKit layout to include all new routes with correct active-state highlighting.

items.title: Svelte 5 Migration — $app/state and $derived()
items.description: Full migration of the SvelteKit dashboard from the deprecated $app/stores pattern to the Svelte 5 $app/state module. Replaces reactive store subscriptions with $derived() computed values. Fixes SSR hydration crashes caused by mismatched store state between server and client render passes.

items.title: CORS and Vite Proxy Fix
items.description: Resolve cross-origin request failures between dashboard (port 4751) and API server (port 4750). All dashboard API calls migrated to use relative URLs routed through the Vite dev proxy. CORS configuration on the Fastify server updated to explicitly allow origins on ports 4751 and 4752.

items.title: Server Route Deduplication — Fix Fastify duplicate registration
items.description: Eliminate duplicate route registrations in server.ts and the v5 route index that caused Fastify to throw 'Method already declared' errors on startup. Audit all route modules for overlapping paths, consolidate registration, and add startup smoke test to prevent regression.

successCriteria: POST /api/v5/run triggers real Anthropic API calls with SSE streaming
AgentRuntime.runStreaming() delivers onChunk events to connected clients
Agent Runner page (/runner) displays live streaming output in browser
Approvals queue (/approvals) shows pending items with approve/deny actions
Knowledge UI (/knowledge) supports search and entry creation
Sprint API returns normalized sprint data for all .agentforge/sprints/*.json files
Dashboard sidebar includes Agent Runner, Approvals, and Knowledge links
All Svelte 5 $app/state migrations complete — zero SSR hydration errors
Vite proxy routes all /api/* traffic — zero CORS errors in dev and prod
Server starts cleanly with zero duplicate route registration errors
auditFindings: No live execution path — dashboard could not trigger real agent runs
AgentRuntime lacked streaming API — only batch/sync execution available
Dashboard missing Agent Runner, Approvals, and Knowledge pages
Sprint data existed on disk but no API endpoint exposed it
$app/stores usage caused SSR hydration crashes in Svelte 5 runtime
API calls used absolute localhost URLs causing CORS failures
Duplicate route registrations crashed server on startup

results.summary: v6.0 delivered the live execution pipeline and completed the dashboard feature set. The Execution API (POST /api/v5/run) connects the browser directly to the Anthropic API with real-time SSE streaming. AgentRuntime gained a runStreaming() method with onChunk/onEvent callbacks. Three new dashboard pages shipped: Agent Runner (/runner), Approvals Queue (/approvals), and Knowledge Graph (/knowledge). The Svelte 5 migration eliminated SSR hydration crashes. CORS and Vite proxy configuration was corrected so all API traffic routes cleanly in both dev and production. Server startup errors caused by duplicate Fastify route registrations were resolved. All existing 3309+ tests continue to pass.
